---
name: Provider Compatibility
about: Report a provider or model that works (or doesn't)
labels: provider
---

**Provider**
[e.g. OpenRouter, Ollama, vLLM, LiteLLM, Azure OpenAI, custom endpoint]

**Model**
[e.g. gpt-4o, qwen/qwen3-235b-a22b, llama3]

**Status**
- [ ] Works out of the box
- [ ] Works with caveats (describe below)
- [ ] Does not work

**Details**
Describe any issues, quirks, or config needed. Include the base URL format if non-obvious.
